risk: Users may treat preliminary results as flight-qualified.
mitigation: README, report, and limitations state the claim boundary.

risk: Simplified environment may understate eclipse/contact/thermal edge cases.
mitigation: Add GMAT/Orekit comparison and higher-fidelity ephemerides.

risk: Subsystem assumptions may drift without interface control.
mitigation: Maintain ICD and tests for required columns.

risk: TT&C deterministic margins may miss weather or pointing losses.
mitigation: Add statistical losses and antenna pattern models.

risk: ADCS simplified controller may not represent hardware limits.
mitigation: Add actuator selection, sensor noise, and controller validation.

risk: Thermal lumped model may miss local hot spots.
mitigation: Use detailed thermal network for later design phases.
